title: Dawn of the Flood 2
description: The flood has returned once more. Will you be able to survive the rising infection and dangerous enemies that come with it?
body:
# Dawn of the Flood by Forge Labs ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
The second wave is here and it’s more relentless than ever. Experts warn: "One single Flood spore can destroy a species." Now, the infection spreads faster, evolving beyond anything we’ve seen before. The world barely survived the first outbreak. This time, it may not be so lucky. Will you rise and resist the second coming of the Flood, or fall… and become one with it?
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)

![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
中文翻译 (Chinese Translation) # 洪水黎明》由 Forge Labs 制作 ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
第二波来了，比以往更加无情。 专家警告：“只需一个洪魔孢子就能毁灭一个物种。”现在，感染传播得更快，进化得超出我们以往见过的任何情况。世界勉强挺过了第一次爆发，但这一次，可能没那么幸运。 你会挺身抵抗洪魔的第二次降临，还是屈服……成为它的一部分？
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
